mapper.select: /* HanjinDlvryAddrRefndMapper.selectHanjinDlvryAddrRefndTgtList 한진택배 주소정제 대상 조회 */ SELECT REFND_TGT.CNTRCTNO AS csr_num ,REFND_TGT.SVCDIV AS svc_div ,REFND_TGT.OBORDKEY AS msg_key ,REFND_TGT.ADDR AS address ,REFND_TGT.CTZIPCD AS snd_zip ,REFND_TGT.RCPPRSNZIPCD AS rcv_zip FROM ( SELECT DL.CNTRCTNO ,'GN' AS SVCDIV ,OH.OBORDKEY ,TRIM(pkg_crypto$decrypt(OH.RCPPRSNADDR1, #{encKey}))||' '||TRIM(pkg_crypto$decrypt(OH.RCPPRSNADDR2, #{encKey})) ADDR ,CT.ZIPCD AS CTZIPCD ,OH.RCPPRSNZIPCD ,ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY OH.OBORDKEY) AS RN FROM TWORK_INFO_OB_ORD_HD OH LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_INFO_HANJIN_PR HPI ON OH.CTKEY = HPI.CTKEY AND OH.OWKEY = HPI.OWKEY AND OH.OBORDKEY = HPI.OBORDKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_DLVRYCORP DL ON OH.CTKEY = DL.CTKEY AND OH.OWKEY = DL.OWKEY AND DL.DLVRYCORPCD = #{dlvryCorpCd} AND DL.DELYN = 'N' INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_CT CT ON OH.CTKEY = CT.CTKEY WHERE OH.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND OH.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND OH.PRINFORCVPRGRYN = 'N' /* 택배주소정제 진행중이 아닌 데이터*/ AND DL.CNTRCTNO IS NOT NULL /* 택배사 계약이 된 데이터 */ AND HPI.RSLTCD IS NULL /* 택배주소정제가 안된 데이터 */ ) REFND_TGT WHERE RN <= 100 ORDER BY RN
